items.name: Hummus Trio
items.description: Classic, roasted red pepper, and beet hummus served with toasted pita.

items.name: Fattoush Caprese
items.description: Lebanese fattoush salad with buffalo mozzarella, cherry tomatoes, and sumac vinaigrette.

items.name: Crispy Kibbeh Arancini
items.description: Pan-fried kibbeh shells filled with risotto and pine nuts, served with tahini aioli.

items.name: Burrata Muhammara
items.description: Creamy burrata over walnut-pepper muhammara with olive oil and pomegranate molasses.

items.name: Garlic Shrimp Sambousek
items.description: Fried pastry pockets filled with garlic butter shrimp.

items.name: Osso Buco Shawarma
items.description: Slow-braised lamb shank spiced like shawarma, served with saffron risotto.

items.name: Chicken Taouk Saltimbocca
items.description: Grilled chicken taouk wrapped in prosciutto and sage, finished with garlic toum.

items.name: Seafood Sayadieh Risotto
items.description: Saffron risotto with sea bass, shrimp, and caramelized onion, inspired by sayadieh rice.

items.name: Eggplant Parmigiana Maqlouba
items.description: Layered eggplant, tomato, and mozzarella baked maqlouba-style with spiced rice.

items.name: Mushroom Freekeh Risotto
items.description: Wild mushroom risotto finished with toasted freekeh and truffle oil.

items.name: Manakish Margherita
items.description: Wood-fired pizza with za'atar-infused crust, tomato, and mozzarella.

items.name: Sujuk Pepperoni Pizza
items.description: Spiced Lebanese sujuk sausage and pepperoni on a tomato-mozzarella base.

items.name: Toum Alfredo Fettuccine
items.description: Fettuccine in a garlic toum-infused alfredo sauce with grilled chicken.

items.name: Lentil Ragu Pappardelle
items.description: Hand-cut pappardelle with a Lebanese lentil and tomato ragu.

items.name: Knafeh Tiramisu
items.description: Layered tiramisu with crispy knafeh strands and orange blossom syrup.

items.name: Pistachio Panna Cotta
items.description: Silky panna cotta with pistachio crumble and rosewater.

items.name: Maamoul Cannoli
items.description: Date and walnut filled cannoli shells dusted with powdered sugar.

items.name: Jallab Spritz
items.description: Non-alcoholic Jallab syrup with sparkling water and pine nuts.

items.name: House Red (Lebanese, Bekaa Valley)
items.description: Glass of medium-bodied red wine from the Bekaa Valley.

items.name: Espresso
items.description: Italian-style single espresso shot.

items.name: Limonana
items.description: Frozen mint lemonade.
